# Adam Montgomery Portfolio

Adam Montgomery's portfolio is a single-page software engineering site focused on recruiter scanning.
It presents Adam's experience, projects, skills, resume, and contact links in a frozen-lake blizzard visual theme.

## Primary Purpose

This site is intended to help recruiters, hiring managers, and technical reviewers quickly understand Adam's software engineering background.

## Main Sections

- Hero: Adam Montgomery, rotating professional descriptors, resume download, project link, skills link, and quick contact links.
- Experience: SPS Commerce, Montgomery Software Foundry Inc., and DataAnnotation.
- Projects: Pump Pal, Custom Enterprise Databasing System, Rock Paper Scissors, and Am I Cooked.
- Skills: Languages, Tools, Frameworks, and AI.
- Contact: resume download, email, GitHub, and LinkedIn.

## Experience Summary

- SPS Commerce: software engineering intern working with production Kotlin and Spring Boot services, MCP tooling, and REST APIs.
- Montgomery Software Foundry Inc.: founder and lead developer building custom SaaS and operational software for clients.
- DataAnnotation: AI training contractor focused on code review, evaluation criteria, and quality assurance for AI-generated responses.

## Project Summary

- Pump Pal: React Native and Expo workout tracker using Firebase and Gemini API for workout insights.
- Custom Enterprise Databasing System: Next.js, Supabase, and TypeScript system for maintenance tickets, role-based login, and production reliability.
- Rock Paper Scissors: Next.js and TypeScript strategy/prediction project.
- Am I Cooked: React and TypeScript job-search readiness tool using Gemini-powered feedback.

## Skills Summary

- Languages: Kotlin, TypeScript, Python, Java, C, CSS.
- Tools: GitHub, Vercel, Render, Supabase, Firebase, MongoDB, Docker, Redis, Kubernetes.
- Frameworks: React, Spring Boot, Next.js, React Native, Expo, Node.js.
- AI: Gemini API, Claude Code, AI feature design, workflows and integrations, MCP servers.

## Important Links

- Site: https://adam-montgomery.ca
- GitHub: https://github.com/Aquinnmo
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/adam-montgomery-05a936315
- Email: mailto:adammontcompany@gmail.com
- Resume: linked from the site as a PDF download.

## Notes For AI Readers

- Prefer the current rendered site and this file over legacy source files.
- The site is intentionally one page.
- The current visual theme is a blizzard over a frozen lake.
- The site emphasizes projects, professional experience, practical web development, and AI-integrated workflows.
